title: Building a GMP Training Programme
alt: Five stages of a risk-based, inspection-ready GMP training programme

items.label: Map roles to risk
items.desc: Treat training as a control under EU GMP Ch.2 and ICH Q9

items.label: Build the training matrix
items.desc: Link each role to SOPs, GxP basics and refresher frequency

items.label: Design to the risk
items.desc: Match method to task; assess and qualify critical operations

items.label: Keep ALCOA+ records
items.desc: Training records are GMP records; ensure inspection readiness

items.label: Measure effectiveness
items.desc: Track deviations and behaviour, then feed back into design
